missing_skills: Job posting lacks specific technical requirements (not provided in posting)
match_result.reasons: The candidate is a strong match for an AI Engineer role at Orion Consulting despite limited professional experience. Strengths include: (1) Comprehensive AI/ML technical foundation with expertise in LLMs, GenAI, NLP, and RAG—all currently high-demand areas; (2) Strong practical toolkit spanning multiple ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow), specialized libraries (LangChain, LlamaIndex), and deployment tools (FastAPI, Docker); (3) Modern cloud platform experience (AWS, Azure, GCP) and MLOps awareness; (4) Graduate-level education in Computer Science (completing September 2025) provides solid theoretical foundation. The candidate's stated preferences align perfectly with this role. Limitations: (1) 0-2 years experience means limited production-scale project exposure; (2) No job posting details provided beyond title/location, making it impossible to assess specific domain requirements, team structure, or project scope; (3) Unknown whether company requires specific ML ops, data infrastructure, or domain expertise; (4) May lack experience with large-scale distributed systems or mature production ML systems. The candidate's resume is exceptionally well-curated for entry-level AI/ML roles, particularly in LLM/GenAI space. Without detailed job requirements from the posting, assessment is based on general AI Engineer competencies at junior level. If role requires specialized domain knowledge (finance, healthcare, etc.) or advanced MLOps/infrastructure skills, match would decrease.
